introSection: Joker is a steel 4th dimension roller coaster located at Six Flags Over Texas in Arlington, Texas, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
On September 1, 2016, it was announced that three Joker-themed roller coasters would be coming to Six Flags Over Texas, Six Flags Great America and Six Flags New England. The ride was installed by Northwest Coasters.

The ride opened to the public on May 20, 2017 following a media day on the 16th and pass holder preview days on the 18th and 19th.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Joker is a 4D Free Spin built by S&S Worldwide. It is a clone of Batman The Ride at Six Flags Fiesta Texas and Joker at Six Flags Great Adventure. Three other clones were constructed in 2017 at Six Flags New England, Six Flags Great America and Nagashima Spa Land.

fullText:
Joker is a steel 4th dimension roller coaster located at Six Flags Over Texas in Arlington, Texas, USA.

On September 1, 2016, it was announced that three Joker-themed roller coasters would be coming to Six Flags Over Texas, Six Flags Great America and Six Flags New England. The ride was installed by Northwest Coasters.

The ride opened to the public on May 20, 2017 following a media day on the 16th and pass holder preview days on the 18th and 19th.

Joker is a 4D Free Spin built by S&S Worldwide. It is a clone of Batman The Ride at Six Flags Fiesta Texas and Joker at Six Flags Great Adventure. Three other clones were constructed in 2017 at Six Flags New England, Six Flags Great America and Nagashima Spa Land.
